---
title: "charge_factor"
---

Charge factors in front to be added in front of the Vector-Vector correlator

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`gm2/HVP/charge_factor.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/gm2/HVP/charge_factor.py)
:::


*No public definitions found in this module.*
